---
title: Post With Code
author: Harlow Malloc
date: '2026-06-30'
categories:
  - news
  - code
  - analysis
image: image.jpg
atproto_image: post-with-code/image.jpg
atUri: at://did:plc:2zcfjzyocp6kapg6jc4eacok/site.standard.document/3mpk4frwfzm2p
---

This is a post with executable code.

```{r}
plot(penguins$bill_len, penguins$body_mass)
```
